text:
JavaScript is a high-level programming language commonly used for web development. It supports functional, object-oriented, and event-driven programming paradigms. Modern JavaScript includes features such as async/await, promises, modules, and arrow functions. Node.js allows JavaScript to run on the server side, enabling full-stack development with a single language.

NestJS is a progressive Node.js framework built with TypeScript. It uses modules, controllers, and providers to create scalable server-side applications. Dependency Injection is one of its core concepts, helping developers write loosely coupled and maintainable code.

React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces. Components are the building blocks of React applications. State and props allow data to flow through components, while hooks such as useState and useEffect provide functionality for managing state and side effects.

PostgreSQL is an open-source relational database management system known for reliability, extensibility, and SQL compliance. It supports advanced features such as JSONB storage, indexing strategies, stored procedures, and full-text search.

Vector databases store embeddings generated by machine learning models. Instead of exact keyword matching, they use similarity search to find semantically related content. Popular vector databases include Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, and pgvector.

Strength training involves performing exercises that improve muscular strength and endurance. Common compound exercises include squats, deadlifts, bench presses, and pull-ups. Progressive overload is the principle of gradually increasing resistance to stimulate muscle growth.

Protein is an essential macronutrient for muscle recovery and growth. Fitness enthusiasts often consume protein-rich foods such as eggs, chicken breast, fish, Greek yogurt, and whey protein supplements to meet their daily requirements.

Ahmedabad is one of the largest cities in Gujarat, India. It is

e protein-rich foods such as eggs, chicken breast, fish, Greek yogurt, and whey protein supplements to meet their daily requirements.

Ahmedabad is one of the largest cities in Gujarat, India. It is known for historical landmarks such as the Sabarmati Ashram, Adalaj Stepwell, and Sidi Saiyyed Mosque. The city is also famous for its vibrant street food and textile industry.

Japan is a popular travel destination known for its blend of modern technology and traditional culture. Visitors often explore Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka, and Mount Fuji while enjoying Japanese cuisine such as sushi, ramen, and tempura.

The Shawshank Redemption is a drama film based on a novella by Stephen King. The story follows Andy Dufresne, a banker who is wrongly convicted of murder and forms a friendship with fellow inmate Ellis Boyd "Red" Redding.

Science fiction movies often explore futuristic technology, space travel, artificial intelligence, and alternate realities. Popular examples include Interstellar, The Matrix, Blade Runner 2049, and Arrival.

Cybersecurity focuses on protecting computer systems, networks, and data from unauthorized access and attacks. Common security practices include multi-factor authentication, encryption, vulnerability scanning, and regular software updates.

Penetration testing is a security assessment technique where ethical hackers simulate attacks on systems to identify vulnerabilities before malicious actors can exploit them.

Italian cuisine is known for dishes such as pizza, pasta, risotto, and lasagna. Olive oil, tomatoes, garlic, basil, and cheese are common ingredients used in traditional Italian cooking.

Gujarati cuisine includes dishes such as dhokla, thepla, fafda, khandvi, and undhiyu. Many Gujarati dishes have a unique balance of sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors.

Large Language Models (LLMs) are AI systems trained on vast amounts of text data. They can perform tasks such as question answering, summarization, translation, coding

et, spicy, and tangy flavors.

Large Language Models (LLMs) are AI systems trained on vast amounts of text data. They can perform tasks such as question answering, summarization, translation, coding assistance, and content generation.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines information retrieval with generative AI. Relevant documents are first retrieved from a knowledge base and then provided as context to a language model, improving accuracy and reducing hallucinations.

RabbitMQ is a message broker used for asynchronous communication between services. It helps decouple applications, improve scalability, and handle background processing tasks. Messages are published to exchanges and routed to queues for consumption.

Redis is an in-memory data store commonly used for caching, session management, rate limiting, and pub/sub messaging. Its high performance makes it suitable for real-time applications.

Docker is a containerization platform that packages applications and their dependencies into lightweight containers. Containers provide consistency across development, testing, and production environments.

Kubernetes is an orchestration platform for managing containerized applications. It automates deployment, scaling, networking, and recovery of applications running across multiple servers.

Git is a distributed version control system that helps developers track code changes, collaborate with teams, and maintain project history. Common Git workflows include branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

Machine Learning is a subset of Artificial Intelligence that enables systems to learn patterns from data and make predictions without being explicitly programmed. Common algorithms include Linear Regression, Decision Trees, Random Forests, and Neural Networks.

Cloud computing provides on-demand access to computing resources such as servers, storage, databases, and networking. Major cloud providers include Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft

al Networks.

Cloud computing provides on-demand access to computing resources such as servers, storage, databases, and networking. Major cloud providers include Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

Microservices architecture breaks large applications into smaller, independently deployable services. Each service focuses on a specific business capability and communicates through APIs or messaging systems.

REST APIs follow a client-server architecture and use HTTP methods such as GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE. RESTful services are stateless and commonly exchange data using JSON.

GraphQL is a query language for APIs that allows clients to request exactly the data they need. It reduces over-fetching and under-fetching issues commonly encountered with REST APIs.
